description: BTC perp funding spiked to multi-month highs during a strong uptrend as longs crowded in near a local high.
outcome: Funding normalized within ~18h; price pushed +4% then mean-reverted -7% over two days as leverage flushed.

description: Perpetual funding blow-off across venues at the tail of a parabolic leg.
outcome: Marked a local top; -10% over the following three days.

description: Minor funding tick inside a low-volatility range with no directional conviction.
Open interest surged into a breakout as new leverage entered.
outcome: Trend continued for a week before a sharp deleveraging wick.
